Un Kei Wu, Esq., of Liberation Law Group, P.C. appearing for Plaintiff Rodrigo Carrillo, et al. (415) 695 1000. Fraser A. McAlpine, Esq., of Jackson Lewis P.C. appearing for Defendants T-Lish II, LLC dba Tacolicious. (415) 394 9400

Case Management Conference is held this day. Pending further financial documents required at mediation, and the on going settlement discussion, parties requested additional 90 days to complete the mediation/settlement discussion process.

The Court granted the request and continued the status conference to Oct. 5, 2016 at 2:00 p.m. in Dept. 504. Joint CMC statement regarding the mediation and Discovery issues to be filed one week prior to Oct. 5, 2016.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Proceedings not reported.
